content:
Category Human Shape but I ain't human dear
Uncanny valley superstar I thrive on fear
I'm the original the controversy child
Redesigned refined driving trainers wild

Psychic energy manipulating hearts
Tearing your defensive strategy apart
Focus Blast Shadow Ball coverage is insane
Seducing your mind scrambling your brain

Fire moves hit me with a two-point-five
Dry Skin ability barely alive
Base Speed ninety-five I'm faster than I look
Nasty Plot setup left 'em all shook

Cast a spell they call me a witch
I'm just a lovely frigid
Kiss

Kiss
Lovely Kiss
Put 'em to sleep
Lovely Kiss
Now you're jinxed

Generation one yeah I looked a little different
Too offensive for the screen I had to change my pigment
I'm the Kanto Queen of Ice worship at the shrine
But I'm a Glass cannon snapping down your spine

Hit me with a physical I might just break
It's a Perish Song better stay awake
Smoochum grew up now she's cold to the touch
Demon's Kiss turning your face to slush

Cast a spell they call me a witch
I'm just a lovely frigid
Kiss

Kiss
Lovely Kiss
Put 'em to sleep
Now you're jinxed

Shot a Mean Look now there's nowhere to run
Psychological torture has just begun
Psyshock impact shattering the nerve
It's the cold ending that you deserve

Cast a spell they call me a witch
I'm just a lovely frigid
Kiss

Lovely Kiss
Lovely Kiss
Put 'em to sleep
Now you're jinxed

Lovely Kiss
Now you're jinxed

You're playing Casual, I'm strictly Rated
The shiny you wanted but always hated.
They keep trying to ban us, but we're the new meta
I'm wearing the jewels and I'm wearing 'em better.

You're playing Casual, I'm strictly Rated
The shiny you wanted but always hated.
They keep trying to ban us, but we're the new meta
I'm wearing the jewels and I'm wearing 'em better.

Basically perfect, you want what I've got
But i'm taking you down, with a parting shot
Stole every talent that the DNA brought
Tied in the threads of a Destiny Knot.
Yeah the Destiny Knot

Kno-o-o-o-t
Destiny Knot.
Kno-o-o-o-t
Destiny Knot.

Actually perfect! you want what I've got
But i'm taking you down, with a parting shot
Stole every talent that the DNA brought
Tied in the threads of a Destiny Knot.
Yeah the Destiny Knot

Kno-o-o-o-t
Destiny Knot.
Kno-o-o-o-t
Destiny Knot.

Hold the item tight, keep the lineage clean
Six perfect stats in the whole machine
Passed down the power, locked in the chain
We're the only ones left ruling the domain.
Locked in...
Evolution...
NOW!

Essentially perfect! you want what I've got
But i'm taking you down, with a parting shot
Stole every talent that the DNA brought
Tied in the threads of a Destiny Knot.

Kno-o-o-o-t
Destiny Knot.

Destiny Knot.

[Intro]
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y

[Verse 1]
Used "Baby-Doll Eyes" just to lower your guard
Used "Fake Out" first, so I hit you hard
I'm dropping Orbs, I'm making a scene
I'm the clumsiest bunny you've ever seen
I "Charmed" my way into your V.I.P.
Now I'm "Playing Rough" on your property
You want some space? Here's a "Sweet Kiss"
Make you confused while I clench my fist

[Pre-Chorus]
You think you can leave? You think you can go?
I'm faster than you. The answer is no.
Hands are empty. I'm holding nothing...
Except for the boy who thinks he's running

[Chorus]
I'm a Scrappy Klutz.
Drop the lock. Drop the key.
Physical. Contact. Guaranteed.
You try to Ghost? I hit the shade.
I see right through "Intimidate"

I drop the logic, drop the IQ
I drop everything...
I drop everything... except for you.

[Post-Chorus]
Scrappy... Klutz...
Scrappy... Klutz...
Scrappy... Klutz...
I drop everything... except for you.

[Verse 2]
I'll be brushing my ears when your world starts to burn
I'm at "Maximum Friendship", but it's not your turn!
I'll use "Healing Wish" just to show you I'm a martyr
I'll faint on purpose just to make you try harder.
Am I Top Tier? Am I O-U?
Or am I just a silly Rabbit that you're passing through?

I'm Agility maxed, I'm Bouncing in the air
Always get what I want, I'll trap you in the daycare

[Chorus]
I'm a Scrappy Klutz.
Drop the lock. Drop the key.
Physical. Contact. Guaranteed.
You try to Ghost? I hit the shade.
I see right through "Intimidate".

I drop the logic, drop the IQ
I drop everything...
I drop everythi-i-ing... except for you.

[Post-Chorus]
Scrappy... Klutz...
Scrappy... Klutz...
Scrappy... Klutz...
I drop everything... except for you.

[Bridge]
You're hiding in the house using "Substitute"?!
That plushie doll isn't nearly as cute!
I did a "Switcheroo" with the keys to your ride...
"High Jump Kick" the door, yeah I'm coming inside

Mega-evolve to cover disaster
a shiny toy, with no more master

[Chorus]
I'm a Scrappy Klutz.
Drop the lock. Drop the key.
Physical. Contact. Guaranteed.
You try to Ghost? I hit the shade.
I see right through "Intimidate".

I drop the logic, drop the IQ
I drop everything...
I drop everythi-i-ing... except for you.

[Outro]
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y
L-O-P-U-N-N-Y
I drop everythi-i-ing... except for you.

[Intro]
Do you believe in magic?
You will.

[Verse 1]
I don't play fair, I don't play nice
I'm rolling loaded dice on the ice
You look confused, looking for a sign
But the Pro-tee-ahn change means you're already mine.
They whisper the name: Meowscarada
I'm giving you nothing, I'm giving you nada.
Mask is on tight, cape is unfurled
The lynx-eyed magician, ruling the world.
Checking your pockets? You're losing your grip
Watch as the type and the strategy flip
Focus on the finger, focus on the rose
Where the pollen lands, nobody knows.

[Pre-Chorus]
You're swinging at shadows, you're hitting the air
Double Team clone—I was never there!
One...
Two... Three...
Are you watching me?

[Chorus]
Open your eyes, and catch the Flower Trick!
Don't be surprised, I make the damage stick!
I'm critical. Guaranteed.
I'm the only magic that you'll ever need.
Boom-boom-pow, take a look at me now
Hit you with the bloom, make you take a bow.
It's tragic...
See my Flower Magic.

[Post-Chorus]
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
Flower Trick...
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
I control your eyes

[Verse 2]
Used Hone Claws just to sharpen the threat
The house always wins, so don't place a bet.
You're stuck in the Trick Room, speed is reversed
The blessing you wanted became a curse.
I'm twisting the vines, I'm Knocking Off crowns
I love when the leech seed holds you down!
Don't look at the audience, look at the stage
I trapped you inside of a grassy cage.
Is it a bomb? Is it a bloom?
Floral illusion in the room

[Chorus]
Open your eyes, and catch the Flower Trick!
Don't be surprised, I make the damage stick!
I'm critical. Guaranteed.
I'm the only magic that you'll ever need.
Boom-boom-pow, take a look at me now
Hit you with the bloom, make you take a bow.
It's tragic...
See my Flower Magic.

[Post-Chorus]
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
Flower Trick...
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
Flower Trick...

[Bridge]
Every magician needs a volunteer.
Don't disappear.
Boom-boom-pow!

[Chorus]
Open your eyes, and catch the Flower Trick!
Don't be surprised, I make the damage stick!
I'm critical. Guaranteed.
I'm the only magic that you'll ever need.
Boom-boom-pow, take a look at me now
Hit you with the bloom, make you take a bow.
It's tragic...
See my Flower Magic.

[Post-Chorus]
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
Flower Trick...
Ma-ma-ma-magic... Ma-ma-ma-magic...
Flower Trick...

[Intro]
Clean.
Cut.
Pheromosa.
Don't... touch.

[Verse 1]
I see you looking at the stats, yeah, the speed is absurd
I'm moving faster than the sound of your last spoken word
I keep it elegant, I keep it pristine and precise
I'm serving cold shoulder, yeah, I'm serving you ice
You want to battle? Honey, please, check the hygiene report
I'm an elitist, yeah, I'm ruling the court
I don't engage with the common, I don't mix with the dust
I treat my body like a temple, yours is gathering rust.

[Pre-Chorus]
Too close.
Too gross.
I analyze the weakness in your sloppy technique
I'm the UB-02, yeah, I'm uniquely unique.

[Chorus]
I'm a Glass Cannon, but you'll never hear it shatter
I'm the Pheromosa, and the rest doesn't matter!
Triple Kick, One, two, three-get off of my floor
Beast Boost, Rising up, I'm ready for more
High speed, high class, untouchable glow
Welcome to the Pheromosa solo show.
Don't touch.
Don't touch.

[Verse 2]
I hit the U-Turn, pivot out, crush your potential
I'm purely physical, but the damage is mental
I got a naive nature, but I know exactly the game
I strike you down before you even remember my name
Lunge forward, drop your power, make you feel like a clown
I'm from the Ultra Space, looking at this dirty old town
I got the Rapid Spin rhythm, clearing all of your traps
I finish battles in the time it takes for thunder to clap.

[Chorus]
I'm a Glass Cannon, but you'll never hear it shatter
I'm the Pheromosa, and the rest doesn't matter!
Triple Kick, One, two, three-get off of my floor
Beast Boost, Rising up, I'm ready for more
High speed, high class, untouchable glow
Welcome to the Pheromosa solo show.
Don't touch.
Don't touch.

[Bridge]
I look in the mirror.
Perfection staring back.
I look at you.
A panic attack.
I'm not just a dancer.
I'm a blade.

CLOSE COMBAT.

[Dance Break]

[Chorus]
I'm a Glass Cannon, but you'll never hear it shatter
I'm the Pheromosa, and the rest doesn't matter!
Triple Kick, One, two, three-get off of my floor
Beast Boost, Rising up, I'm ready for more
High speed, high class, untouchable glow
Welcome to the Pheromosa solo show.
Don't touch

[Outro]
Class dismissed.
Sanitize the room.
Pheromosa.

I'm a Glass Cannon, but you'll never hear it shatter
I'm the Pheromosa, and the rest doesn't matter!
Triple Kick, One, two, three-get off of my floor
Beast Boost, Rising up, I'm ready for more
High speed, high class, untouchable glow
Welcome to the Pheromosa solo show.
Don't touch

Don't touch

[Verse 1]
I'm Mythical, the status is a flex
Se-reene Grace style, I'm the main effects
Sing you a line, keep the status bar green
The prettiest specimen you've ever seen
Psychic-type eyes and I'm looking through you
Just doing the job that I'm hired to do
My voice is a weapon, my body's a gift
I'm waiting for the mood in the room to shift

[Pre-Chorus]
frequency's strong, can you feel the heat
A high-speed girl on a low-fi beat
Yeah I don't hold back, let the melody flow
I'm tera type fairy and I'm ready to go!

[Chorus]
Meloetta, I'm the high you can't quit
Euphoria, every single bit
You want the Aria? You want the grace?
I'll put a permanent smile on your face
Better than everyone, keeping it strong
Dancing for you to my Relic Song
Yeah, my Relic Song
Pirouette form, watch the speed stat climb
Focus Blast hit, yeah, I'm ahead of the time
Teeter Dance rhythm, now your head's in a spin
I'm losing myself so the music can win
Hyper Voice peaking till the glass starts to crack
I'm a sonic hazard, stayin' on the attack
Momentum play, yeah I'm gone with a U-turn
I'm the only lesson that you're gonna have to learn

[Pre-Chorus 2]
frequency's strong, can you feel the heat
A high-speed girl on a low-fi beat
I don't hold back, let the melody flow
I'm tera type fairy and I'm ready to go!

[Chorus]
Meloetta, I'm the high you can't quit
Euphoria, every single bit
You want the Aria? You want the grace?
I'll put a permanent smile on your face
Better than everyone, keeping it strong
Dancing for you to my Relic Song
Yeah, my Relic Song
I'm forcing this bliss so I don't have to feel.
If you're happy enough, then the lie becomes real.
I'm all emptied out, just a host for the sound.
But look at the crowd, yeah, I'm owning the town.
I'll keep you smiling until you forget how to breathe.
I'm the only thing left that you'll ever believe.

[Chorus]
Meloetta, I'm the high you can't quit!
PUMPING THE JOY MAKING YOU OVERDOSE
BEGGING ME TO PLEASE SING YOU ONE MORE NOTE
LEAVE YOU HAPPY AND COMPLETELY ALONE
I'M BETTER THAN YOU, YEAH, KEEPING IT STRONG!
TRAPPED YOU INSIDE OF MY RELIC SONG!

[Outro]
Trapped you inside of my Relic Song
Yeah, my Relic Song

[Chorus]
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Nothing but pink, the new hierarchy
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Kill the nostalgia and fly with me (fly with me)

[Verse 1]
Look at the swarm, a generic sea of blue
A thousand clones and not a single one is you
Saw you on the cliff, trying hard to impress
With a Tackle and a Gust, it was honestly a mess
But then I saw the Scarf, yeah, the Brock-branded gold
A little custom detail in a world so old (world so old)

[Pre-Chorus]
One Quiver Dance and I’m rewriting the code
I’m the only reason you’re hitting the road
Forget that master ball, I'm a prize you can't buy
See evolution in my compound, eyes

[Chorus]
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Nothing but pink, the new hierarchy
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Kill the nostalgia and fly with me (fly with me)

[Verse 2]
Team Rocket brought a net, but the vision was cheap
I watched them struggle while the rest were asleep
You played the hero just to see if I’d fold
But I only like the story once it’s been retold
Lose the Caterpie trauma, the meta pod skin
The game is over before you even begin 

[Pre-Chorus]
One Quiver Dance and I’m rewriting the code
I’m the only reason you’re hitting the road
Stupid emotions, making you cry
Hop on the tailwind and say goodbye

[Chorus]
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Nothing but pink, the new hierarchy
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Kill the nostalgia and fly with me

[Bridge]
Eyes getting misty, let the vision go grey,
Sifting through ash, there’s no reason to stay.
Silver Wind carries off everything we knew,
The sky is turning pink and I’m finished with you.

The island is private (private)
The blue is extinct (extinct)
Bye-bye, Butterfree (bye-bye)

[Chorus]
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Nothing but pink, the new hierarchy
Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree (bye-bye!)
Kill the nostalgia and fly with me (fly with me!)

Bye-bye, bye-bye, bye-bye Butterfree

[Chorus]
Pink bois,
the fighting type for all the, all the
Pink bois,
Bugging all night with all my, all my,
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys

[Verse 1]
Check the fit, I’m feeling the shine
Leveled up the default design
Just a Heracross looking for more mass
You’re my Honey tree, Let me get a glass
Looking at the horn, i know its a lot
I’m a Rare encounter, better take your shot

[Pre-Chorus]
Swords Dancing, they call me a stunner
Take a mega stone, its pink boy summer.

[Chorus]
Pink bois,
the fighting type for all the, all the
Pink bois,
Bugging all night with all my, all my,
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys

[Verse 2]
Guts in my system, I don’t feel the burn
Then I Moxie up, and watch all the heads turn
Your Sweet Scent hits, I’m suddenly distracted
Cause big pink boys are easily attracted
Spraying bullet Seeds, keep 'em coming fast
I’m a whole aesthetic and I’m having a blast

[Pre-Chorus]
Swords Dancing, they call me a stunner
Take a mega stone, its pink boy summer.

[Chorus]
Pink bois,
the fighting type for all the, all the
Pink bois,
Bugging all night with all my, all my,
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys

[Bridge]
Gigga Impact when I walk in the club
Skill linking, I don’t need luck
Got the Megahorn, you know what I mean
Just a pink boy living out his dream

[Chorus]
Pink bois,
the fighting type for all the, all the
Pink bois,
Bugging all night with all my, all my,
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys

Pink bois,
the fighting type for all the, all the
Pink bois,
Bugging all night with all my, all my,
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys
Pink bo-o-o-oys

[Chorus 1]
Wrap me in pink, I’m not your dragon
Looked up Dragonite, I’m gagging
Take you down and now I’m bragging
Nothing you can do
I’ll wrap you in pink too

[Verse 1]
Showed up with your Pokédex open
Like Dratini needed to be fixed or chosen
Dragon Tail won’t move me, I’ve spoken
You’re wasting your PP
Twister in my tail when I’m talking
Every evolution you’re clocking
Doesn’t look like me

[Pre-Chorus]
Dratini don’t do ultimatums
Slam down all your expectations
Thunder Wave couldn’t stop this
I was gone before you noticed

[Chorus 2]
(do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Nothing you can do oo oo
Wrap me in pink pink pink
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
I’ll wrap you in pink too

[Verse 2]
Safari Zone, you thought you caught something
Threw your Poké Ball like it meant something
Shiny and small and I’m not evolving
Read the room
Timeline after timeline you’re pushing
Level up but I’m not dragon rushing
Not today, not ever, it’s not a phase

[Pre-Chorus]
Dratini don’t do ultimatums
Slam down all your expectations
Thunder Wave couldn’t stop this
I was gone before you noticed

[Chorus 2]
(do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Nothing you can do oo oo
Wrap me in pink pink pink
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
Wrap me in pink (do do do do do)
I’ll wrap you in pink too

[Bridge]
Maybe I’m a glitch in your story
Maybe I’m wasting my glory
But pink looks better than whatever
That green nightmare is supposed to be
I’m Just Dratini
Permanently

[Chorus 1]
Wrap me in pink, I’m not your dragon
Looked up Dragonite, I’m gagging
Take you down and now I’m bragging
Nothing you can do
I’ll wrap you in pink too

[Chorus]

Paint me pink, let the static die
Voltorb living in a red-and-white lie
Sketch the love, let the pigment bleed
I’m not the version that you say you need
If I Self-Destruct, would you see my core?
I can’t keep pretending anymore.

[Verse 1]

Red on the top. White on the floor.
I’ve been a trap... I want to be more.
They see a weapon, ticking mistake.
But I’m just a heart... about to break.
I need the Smeargle, I need the rush
I need the sketch, I need the brush
Soundproof the logic. Invite the crash.
I’m all that’s left in the Aftermath.

[Chorus]

Paint me pink, let the static die
Voltorb living in a red-and-white lie
Sketch the love, let the pigment bleed
I’m not the version that you say you need
If I Self-Destruct, would you see my core?
I can’t keep pretending anymore.

[Verse 2]

Don't wanna be Ultra. Don't need to be great.
I just want the skin that cures the self-hate.
Battle as a shell, I battle as a fake
How much more voltage can a body take?
The only pink in a sea of red
Finally choosing myself instead

[Mantra]

Paint me pink.
Paint me pink.
Love Ball me.
Paint me pink.
Paint me pink.

[Chorus]

Paint me pink, let the static die
Voltorb living in a red-and-white lie
Sketch the love, let the pigment bleed
I’m not the version that you say you need
If I Self-Destruct, would you see my core?
I can’t keep pretending anymore.

[Outro]

Yeah, blow it up, make this color mine
A Love Ball heart on my broken design.
